affected_pattern: billing records dropped during weekly archival window with NULL TotalCharges in the active DB
root_cause: Archival job deleted before billing — the archival job truncated the billing record staging table before the weekly billing job had read it, so both the active and billing databases ended up with NULLs for the same period.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Archival-Before-Billing Ordering Defect pattern
Cron ordering shows archival scheduled 15 minutes before billing
Audit log shows TRUNCATE on staging prior to billing SELECT
recommended_action: Reorder jobs so billing runs before archival, enforced by DAG
Recover billing records from archival storage and replay billing
Replace TRUNCATE with soft-delete + retention policy
Add integration test: billing job sees staging non-empty after trigger
